app.program_finished_incomplete: Program finished — not all goals activated

level_error.title: Execution Failed
level_error.default_msg: The explorer couldn't reach the destination. Check your sequence!

1.name: First Steps
1.description: Walk forward and activate the goal tiles. Simple!

2.name: Climbing Up
2.description: Use JUMP to reach higher ground. Use F1 to save steps!

3.name: Turn Around
3.description: Turn around and walk forward. Use F1 to save steps!

errors.ERR_PATH_BLOCKED: Path is blocked by an obstacle!
errors.ERR_INVALID_JUMP: Cannot jump: height difference must be exactly 1 level!

welcome.title: Welcome to Stepwise!
welcome.description: Get ready to master the art of logic. Your mission is to guide the automated explorer by programming its movements step-by-step. Have fun learning!

commands.title: Command Palette
commands.description: These are the logical instructions available to you. Use them to write the direct movement routines for your explorer.

commandsTwo.title: Building the Sequence
commandsTwo.description: Click a command to inject it into your codebase. Remember: when the explorer stands on a target tile, you must execute the [ACTIVATE] command to power up the node.

sequence.title: Code Pipeline
sequence.description: This is your current instruction sequence. Commands will execute in strict order from left to right. Plan your strategy!

sequenceDrag.title: Reorganize Code
sequenceDrag.description: Don't worry if you make a mistake! You can drag and drop commands within the sequence to rearrange their order or fix your path easily.

controlButtons.title: Execution Console
controlButtons.description: Use these to compile your code: hit [PLAY] to run your program, [STOP] to halt operations, or [CLEAR] to wipe the board and rewrite your script.

speed.title: Clock Speed
speed.description: Adjust the CPU processing speed. Overclock the timer to see instant results, or slow it down to debug your path step-by-step.

canvas.title: Mission Sector
canvas.description: The 3D grid layout of the operation. Your objective is to map out the perfect path and switch on all glowing nodes to clear the level.

functions.title: Function Blocks
functions.description: You're running out of space! Functions let you package a routine to reuse it. Tap the [F1] slot to open its dedicated memory and program the commands you want to repeat inside it.

functionsTwo.title: Calling F1
functionsTwo.description: Once your function is programmed, switch back to the [MAIN] slot and add the [F1] command to your pipeline. Every time the processor reads [F1], it will execute all the instructions stored inside it, saving valuable space.
